topStories.title: 101 equity mutual funds doubled money in 5 years; 4 did it in just 3. Should you invest now?

Fund managers recommend diversified equity funds over concentrated sector bets, citing attractive valuations and long-term opportunities despite near-term market volatility.

topStories.title: US Stock Market: Fed officials welcome softer US inflation, seek more evidence before policy shift

Policymakers remain committed to restoring price stability and await further confirmation.
